title: dactylorchis incarnata var. sublatifolia
intro: Dactylorchis incarnata var. sublatifolia, also known as the lesser twayblade, is a rare species of orchid native to Europe and Asia. The lesser twayblade has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and even exhibit antibacterial properties. The herbal preparations of lesser twayblade include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
